standalone_features: Multi-agent code review (12 review agents with LLM domain classification)
Document review with automatic agent triage and scored findings
Multi-agent research orchestration with parallel dispatch
Domain-specific knowledge injection from config profiles
Synthesis with a degraded host fallback when intersynth is absent (full-fidelity synthesis recommends intersynth)

integrated_features.feature: Full-fidelity synthesis (discourse layer: reactions, Lorenzen move validation, stemma, sycophancy, DWSQ)
integrated_features.fallback: Degraded host synthesis per docs/spec/contracts/synthesis-delegation.md — core verdict + findings preserved, discourse layer dropped, output labeled 'degraded synthesis'
